title: Monnina lanceolata
taxonomy: Monnina lanceolata is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae. It is native to South America, specifically in the tropical regions. This plant belongs to the genus Monnina, which includes approximately 100 species of flowering plants. The Polygalaceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as milkworts or butterpurs. Monnina lanceolata is a type of perennial herb that grows in the wild.
